We are happy to announce Mr. Sachin Bhatia, Founder and CGO at Exotel, will be joining us for a fireside chat at The Conquest Mixer 2026.

Sachin is a seasoned entrepreneur and the Co-founder of @exotel_com , a leading cloud communication platform empowering businesses to seamlessly engage with their customers at scale. With years of experience building and scaling startups, Sachin has played a pivotal role in shaping India’s SaaS and telecom infrastructure landscape.

The fireside chat will feature insights on building resilient startups, navigating product-market fit, and lessons from his journey of scaling Exotel into a category-defining company.

📍 @venturexindia , Sector 67, Gurgaon
Register now. Link in bio

We are happy to announce Mukul Singhal, Co-founder & Partner at Pravega Ventures, will be joining us for a fireside chat at The Conquest Mixer 2026

Pravega Ventures is an early-stage venture capital firm backing high-potential startups across different sectors of technology, with Mukul actively working with founders to scale and build impactful businesses in the Indian startup ecosystem.

The fireside chat will feature insights on venture capital, startup growth, and lessons he has learnt along his journey.

📍 @venturexindia Workspace, Sector 67, Gurgaon
Register now. Link in bio

#ConquestForStartups #MakeAMark #RegisterNow

“The ideal job is to find people much smarter than you.”

Kshitij Khandelwal (Co-founder & CTO, Pixxel) shared a perspective every growing startup needs to hear:

It’s not just about taking ownership.
It’s about empowering others to take responsibility.

Register for Conquest '26 (link in bio)

#MakeAMark #ConquestForStartups #pixxel

“Great products win when the timing is right.”

Dinesh Pai(VP - Business Analysis and Investments, Rainmatter by Zerodha) shared a perspective every founder should hear:

It’s not just about hard work.
It’s about timing.

The takeaway?
Don’t just build 
build when the market is ready.
#MakeAMark #ConquestForStartups 
Register for conquest'26 (link in bio)

For early-stage founders, learning from experienced operators and industry leaders can be a powerful catalyst for growth. 🚀

At Conquest, startups gain access to 100+ mentors, including founders of leading startups and CXOs of unicorns, who provide practical guidance on product development, business strategy, and scaling challenges. These 1:1 mentoring sessions are designed to help founders navigate the critical challenges that they may face while building.

Applications are now open! Link in bio

#ConquestForStartups #ApplyNow #MakeAMark

At Conquest, we are looking for the next generation of founders who are ready to #MakeAMark.

Our goal is simple: We handle the noise, so you can actually build. We do this by giving
founders:
● 30L+ of Equity-free Grants to fuel your growth. 💰
● Fundraising Support and 1:1 Mentorship from 100+ industry titans. 🎓
● Media Coverage to put your vision on the map. 🎤
● Access to $300k+ of Premium Resources to help you build faster. 📈

We’re ready to see what you’re building.
Apply from the link in the bio.


#ConquestForStartups #entrepreneurship #startups #conquest26

Conquest'25 | Official Aftermovie 
Registrations For Conquest'26 Open Now | link in bio

@fatrabbitproductions #conquestforstartups 
#makeamark #conquest26

Demo Day ‘25 was an incredible success! From over 3,000 applications, 12 groundbreaking startups took the stage at Taj MG Road, Bangalore for an exciting Shark Tank-style showdown. 

₹20 lakhs in equity-free grants were awarded to our cohort’s trailblazers Lifespark Technologies, Kustodian.life, Marman Climate Smart Technology Private Limited, and unbubble.co, who impressed our jury with their breakthroughs in healthtech, fintech, and sustainability. 

Relive all the excitement in this vibrant recap video, brought to life by our production partner, @fatrabbitproductions

We are happy to announce the Demo Day fireside chat with Sudhir Sethi, Founder of Chiratae Ventures, as he sits down with Bismah Malik, Senior Journalist at @inc42.media, for an unfiltered conversation on building one of India’s first VC firms, Chiratae’s philosophy and impact on India’s economy and startup culture.

📅 Date: August 10th
📍 Venue: The Taj, MG Road, Bangalore
⏰ Time: 5:15PM

Register for Demo Day now. Link in bio.

#MakeAMark

We are happy to announce the Demo Day fireside chat with Prashant Pitti, Co-Founder of @easemytrip, as he sits down with Shilpika Ganeriwala, Chief of Staff at @razorpay, for an unfiltered conversation on building, scaling, and staying ahead in India’s fast-changing startup landscape.

📅 Date: August 10th
📍 Venue: The Taj, MG Road, Bangalore
⏰ Time: 3:15PM

Register for Demo Day now. Link in bio.

 #MakeAMark

We visited the PrimeVP office yesterday for an incredibly impactful session for our founders! The cohort was welcomed by Amit Somani, after which Shivani Kulkarni and Gaurav Ranjan shared actionable insights on fundraising from VCs and understanding metrics. 

The founders then interacted 1:1 with Brij Bhushan and members from the PrimeVP investment team to ask questions and form meaningful connections. 

The Conquest team also got to connect with Pankaj Agarwal from the PrimeVP investment team, a BITS Alum who was involved in organizing the early editions of Conquest!

A huge thank you to the entire PrimeVP team, Jerome Manuel and Pankaj Agarwal for such a well thought out and effective session.

Yesterday we hosted the Conquest, BITS Pilani x @thewtfund Mixer at @thehbengaluru. 
It was an incredible gathering of early-stage founders, leading investors, and industry pioneers from Bangalore’s vibrant startup ecosystem. We were honored to host Kshitij Khandelwal, Dinesh Pai, and Anagha Rajesh for an engaging panel discussion titled "The Next Round," expertly moderated by Arshia Mal.
The evening continued with a lively open networking session, where attendees shared insights through candid conversations and formed meaningful connections.A big thank you to the teams at WTFund and The Hub Bengaluru for their support in making this impactful event possible!

We hosted India’s biggest student initiative for startup accelerators- CONQUEST by BITS Pilani 

Here’s a gist of what happened yesterday~
A mixer where Students, Founders and Venture Capitalists conversed and got to know each other and pick each others brains! 

The panelists are some of our country’s most sought after in the world of business and technology, and we got to host them! 

At The Hub Bengaluru, we’re building more than just a space.
It’s a home for ideas, community, and unforgettable moments

Wondering why we made this piece?

Because attention is the new currency and we wanted to get yours!

Now that we have it, let us tell you more about us

Wondering what The Hub is all about?!

‼️At @thehubbengaluru, we help creators and brands collaborate on impactful campaigns that resonate with Gen Z and Millennial audiences. With over 200 million annual impressions, we drive meaningful results through sharp strategy, compelling storytelling, and cross-platform amplification. 

Want to connect with the minds behind the madness?

Book a call with our creative agency @hubverse

Tap into next-level Video Production at @hubstudios.live

Or explore bold Branding & Design solutions with @studiophooling

From The Hub Bengaluru to Hubverse, Studio Phooling, and Hub Studios-our collective is more than just an agency.
It’s an ecosystem built on creativity, collaboration, and culture.

- Top 12 startups 🚀
- 20+ lakhs in grants 💰
- 40+ investors 💸

Witness India’s top startups pitch to prominent investors in Shark Tank-style, attend insightful panel discussions, and gain access to networking opportunities with 300+ attendees from leading startups, VCs, and media houses.

📅 10 August, 2025 (Sunday)
⏰ 10:00 AM 
📍 Taj MG Road, Bangalore

Grab a limited pass to the 21th edition of Demo Day. Link in Bio 🔗

#MakeAMark #ConquestForStartups

BITS PILANI IS HERE!!!

The Hub Bengaluru is proud to announce that we are the Official Venue partner for CONQUEST by BITS Pilani 

This is where innovation meets ambition! 

Founders, innovators, dreamers! Get Ready!

.
.
.
.
.

#thehubbengaluru #bangalore #genz #viral

Today, we kicked off the offline accelerator phase of Conquest 2025 with an in-person meet-up at Cubbon Park, Bengaluru. 🌳

After three weeks of intensive online mentoring and sessions, our startup founders finally came together, walking, talking, and connecting during a long morning walk, followed by a relaxed brunch.

This marked the beginning of the offline leg of Conquest, where founders will now engage in a series of curated events leading up to the much-awaited Demo Day on August 10th. 🚀

Presenting the Conquest 2025 Cohort 🚀

From over 3,200+ applications, we've selected 14 high-potential startups from across India—along with 10 startups from our Greenovation Challenge, to be part of this year’s accelerator.

Over the next 5 weeks, they’ll engage with top mentors, refine their GTM and fundraising strategies, and work toward building investor-ready ventures.

This marks the beginning of their journey—and we can’t wait to see them.

#MakeAMark

We are glad to announce the Conquest Investor Showcase, running from 19th to 27th July.

The Investor Showcase is a unique opportunity, where startups from our cohort pitch their ideas to some of India’s top investors. 🚀

We are grateful to be joined by:

- Pushpa Saroj, Abhishek Kakkar from IAN Group (formerly Indian Angel Network)
- Rohan Picha, Rishabh Raj from Unicorn India Ventures
- Shivam Prasad from Upsparks Capital
- Kritika Julka, Preet Kanwar Singh Maan, Tanisha Goel from Inflection Point Ventures
- Manish Maheshwari from BAT VC
- And several others from WaterBridge Ventures, Ideaspring Capital, Inuka Capital, 1Crowd, Theia Ventures

These sessions connect our founders with some of India’s prominent investors, providing high-quality exposure and visibility. 💫

#ConquestForStartups #MakeAMark

“Everyone thought it was crazy, but it gave us the widest distribution.” 🚀 

Aditi Shrivastava, Co-founder of @thearcweb, breaks down some of the worst advice founders get while picking a co-founder, why early decisions often look disastrous, and how going free when everyone else was going paywalled turned out to be their moat.

#ConquestForStartups

Conquest, in collaboration with @earthonusa, presents The Greenovation Challenge♻️

Sustainability has become a critical area for innovation. The Greenovation Challenge caters to startups working on this issue. This track spotlights the top 10 startups working to build a more sustainable future. 🌱

EarthON Foundation is working towards a cleaner and greener planet by promoting sustainability through education, innovation, and action. EarthON is focused on spreading awareness and practical eco-friendly solutions. 🌏

#ConquestForStartups

“In a matter of 45-50 days we went from an idea to something that hundreds of thousands of people are using.”

Aadit Palicha, Co-founder of @zeptonow, shares with Conquest, BITS Pilani how startups build credibility from an early stage.

Watch the video to know more!

#motivation #startup #business #conquest #Entrepreneur #founder

Shuvi Shrivastava, Ex-Partner at @lightspeedindia share's her experience.

#ConquestForStartups #MakeAMark #VC #Startup

Dipti Tandon, founder of Jeevansathi.com breaks it down.

It has been exactly a month since Conquest ‘25 kicked off with the Launch Event, powered by @getvisit. Over 100+ guests, including top founders, investors and CXOs, attended the event, which was held at WeWork Blue One Square in Gurugram. 🚀

The event began with a keynote address from Aloke Bajpai, Group CEO - @ixigo. This was followed by a fireside chat with Bipin Preet Singh, MD and CEO - @mymobikwik , which was moderated by Udayan Pandey of Blume Ventures. 

Catch the highlights of the event in our recap, created by @dvmbitspilani.

Thanks to all the attendees for making the Conquest Launch Event a huge success! 💫

Register now for Conquest (link in bio 🔗)

#WeWorkLabs @wework.in 
#MakeAMark

Sarita Raichura, Director at Blume Ventures shares with us about the red flags seen with founders coming together to build a startup.

#motivation #startup #business #conquest #Entrepreneur #founder

Conquest, BITS Pilani's flagship startup accelerator, is back for its 21st edition!

What started off as a Business Plan Competition in the Lecture Theatre Complex at BITS Pilani is now 𝗜𝗻𝗱𝗶𝗮'𝘀 𝗹𝗮𝗿𝗴𝗲𝘀𝘁 𝘀𝘁𝘂𝗱𝗲𝗻𝘁-𝗿𝘂𝗻 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘁𝘂𝗽 𝗮𝗰𝗰𝗲𝗹𝗲𝗿𝗮𝘁𝗼𝗿.

Every edition of Conquest has added its own story: from humble beginnings where a small group dared to dream big, to the present day where an ever-growing community of founders, mentors, and alumni come together to learn from each other’s experiences. 

With a legacy of nurturing over 2000 startups including @sarla_aviation Atlan, and @thinkerbell_labs, Conquest is a 7-week journey designed to supercharge startups in their zero-to-one journeys. 

Our philosophy is simple: we accelerate processes that would happen anyways by providing founders the resources, mentorship, and networks that they need.

✅ INR 1Cr+ in equity-free grants over the past three years 
✅ Resources worth over $300K every year, including credits from @amazonwebservices, @notionhq, and more
✅ Backing from top investors, and mentorship from leaders at @razorpay, @bigbasketcom & @unacademy 

If you believe your startup is ready for the next leap, we’re here for you. 

𝗡𝗼 𝗳𝗲𝗲𝘀. 𝗡𝗼 𝗲𝗾𝘂𝗶𝘁𝘆. 𝗝𝘂𝘀𝘁 𝗖𝗼𝗻𝘃𝗶𝗰𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻.

𝗥𝗲𝗴𝗶𝘀𝘁𝗲𝗿 𝗻𝗼𝘄! Link in bio. 🔗

21 Years of #MakeAMark
#StartupAccelerator #Entrepreneurship

Conquest ‘25 kicked off with a successful Launch Event powered by @getvisit at WeWork Blue One Square in Gurugram on April 16th.

The evening started with a keynote address from Aloke Bajpai, Group CEO - @ixigo, through which he shared his journey and learnings growing ixigo throughout the years.

The address was followed by a fireside chat from Bipin Preet Singh, MD and CEO - @mymobikwik , moderated by Udayan Pandey of Blume Ventures. Bipin shared about his journey from being an IT engineer to building a billion dollar company.

100+ guests from the Conquest Network attended the event, including top founders, investors and CXOs. After the talks, the guests shared interesting conversations over food from @eventia.kitchen. The event was covered by @dvmbitspilani.

Thank you to all who joined us for making Conquest ‘25 Launch Event an incredible success.💫

Register now for Conquest (link in bio🔗)

@wework.in #ConquestForStartups #MakeaMark #WeWorkLabs

We are excited to announce Bipin Preet Singh Founder and CEO of @mymobikwik will be having a Fireside chat at the Conquest ‘25 Launch Event powered by @getvisit .

MobiKwik is a leading Indian fintech company offering digital wallet, UPI, and Buy Now Pay Later services. It aims to simplify financial transactions for millions of users across India.

The fireside chat will be moderated by Udayan Pandey of Blume Ventures.

Register now from the link in the bio to network with top investors and founders.

#MakeaMark #WeWorkLabs #ConquestForStartups @wework.in

We are excited to announce Aloke Bajpai as a Keynote Speaker for the Conquest ‘25 Launch Event. 

Aloke Bajpai is the Group CEO of ixigo, an Indian technology company focused on empowering Indian travelers to book and manage their trips.

Under Aloke’s leadership, ixigo has gone from a bootstrapped startup to India’s leading travel search and planning business, with over 20 million active users every month across mobile and web.

Register now from the link in bio to network with top investors and founders. 
#MakeaMark #weworklabs #weworkindia

“In the startup journey, the first step is to nail down the problem “🔨

Varchas Subrahmanya of ADP shares with us about the importance of identifying problems in the market and building business around that.

#motivation#startup#business#conquest#ADP#Entrepreneur#founder

“There’s a thin line between passion and foolishness.” 💡

Zerodha’s Nithin Kamath shares how he built India’s biggest brokerage firm without VC funding amidst a period of financial uncertainty. 🚀

#NithinKamath #Zerodha #Startups #Entrepreneur #FounderMindset #StockMarket #Investing #BusinessGrowth #Finance

What does it take to build India’s leading multi-game platform?⚡

Discover how Dr. Trivikraman Thampy, Co-Founder & Co-CEO of Games24x7, revolutionized the gaming industry by blending data science, behavioral economics, and an unyielding entrepreneurial spirit, in our exclusive Fireside Chat!

Don’t miss this invaluable conversation filled with actionable insights for both founders and investors alike. 🚀

👉 The full chat is out now on our YouTube!

Demo Day '24 was a huge success! From over 3,000 applications, 14 innovative startups took the stage in an exciting Shark Tank-style showdown. Over ₹24 lakhs in equity-free grants were awarded to trailblazers like Angirus® IND, Prodancy Pvt Ltd., and Qlan, showcasing breakthroughs in Sustainability, B2B SaaS, and ConsumerTech/Healthcare.

The event was more than just pitches—it was a celebration of entrepreneurship, with inspiring panel discussions and valuable networking. Don’t miss the highlights in our recap video, created with @matar_media!

#MakeAMark

🎬 Catch the exclusive telecast of Demo Day this Sunday, 15th September at 6PM, only on ET Now! 

From trailblazing pitches to inspiring moments, revisit the highlights of a day that celebrated innovation, entrepreneurship, and groundbreaking startups. 🚀

#MakeAMark

📢 We recently organised the Conquest Alumni Mixer at WeWork Embassy One, Bangalore, as a part of the Conquest Alumni Community— an initiative for cohort members across Conquest’s editions to connect, share knowledge, and support each other in their journeys. 

The mixer saw founders engage in fruitful conversations, discuss synergies and share contacts.. Founders from previous cohorts also shared insights and growth strategies with our current cohort. 🎉

Conquest is now all set for Demo Day, which will host 15+ Unicorn Founders, 20+ media houses and 25+ VC partners on the 11th of August at Four Seasons, Bangalore. Register now from the link in bio.

A mini Shark Tank episode, but only better!⚡

Demo Day is an exclusive event where top early-stage startups from India pitch to the biggest investors to stand a chance to grab over ₹25 lakhs in equity-free cash grants!

But that’s not all, experience engaging and insightful discussions among some of the brightest minds from the ecosystem, network with top operators from Bangalore in a room buzzing with ideas among investors from Blume, Titan Capital, Peak XV among many more.🚀

📆Date: 11 August 2024
🏢Venue: Four Seasons, Bangalore

Limited Seats available. Register now from the link in bio!

🌟 Last night was unforgettable at the stunning terrace of Inventus Law!

We were thrilled to host a captivating fireside chat with Phanindra Sama, co-founder & CEO of RedBus, moderated by the dynamic Ashitha Bhagwan, Managing Partner at Inventus Law. 

✨ The evening provided an exceptional platform for our cohort startup founders to connect with partners from top VC firms, all while enjoying great food, drinks, and inspiring conversations. 🚀🥂

#ConquestForStartups #MakeAMark #redbus #phanindrasama #startuplife

🌟 We had an incredible day at @lightspeedventurepartners in Koramangala yesterday, hosting an enlightening fireside chat with Ishaan Preet Singh, cofounder of Frontrow and now a visionary VC. 

🚀 Ishaan shared profound insights from his dual experience as a founder and a VC, captivating our Conquest cohort founders.

He covered:
🔹 Timing the Launch: Timing is crucial. Launch early to gather real-world feedback and iterate rapidly.
🔄 Incorporating Feedback: Balance feedback with intuition. Use feedback to inform decisions but trust your gut for innovative features.
🧠 Advisory Wisdom: Filter advice from investors and experts, but ultimately trust your instincts.

We are immensely grateful to Ishaan for his invaluable insights. After the chat, Lightspeed executives engaged directly with our founders, fostering meaningful connections and discussions. 🌐✨ 

#MakeAMark

📢 We successfully conducted The Conquest Mixer at HustleHub, HSR Layout yesterday! 

Mr. Neeraj Tyagi, co-founder of We Founders Circle, led a captivating fireside chat, followed by dynamic networking among 50+ attendees, including founders, associates, and VCs over food & drinks.

Neeraj talked about his experience as a celebrated entrepreneur and his insights about the Indian startup ecosystem.💡

The event was supported by @bankonfi , India’s leading money management platform trusted by over 3.5M users 

Intrigued? Witness the whole Bangalore startup scene converge again at Four Seasons, Bangalore for Demo Day ‘24. Register now at demoday.conquest.org.in🚀

This casual meetup perfectly set the tone for the upcoming week, where founders will work together in a co-working space, build stronger connections, and gear up for Demo Day this Sunday. 🚀

Attention all early-stage startup founders📢
Conquest, BITS Pilani’s flagship startup accelerator is back with its 19th edition!

Backed by WestBridge Capital, Conquest is an extensive 7-week long program where India's most promising early-stage startups get access to equity-free grants worth 30L+🚀, a mentor network of 100+ industry experts💡, fundraising opportunities from India's most prolific investors including Matrix Partners India, Nexus Venture Partners, Chiratae Ventures among others.

Network🤝 with stalwarts of the ecosystem like Nithin Kamath, Aadit Palicha, Ashish Singhal and many more, pitch to angels and VCs at the Demo Day in BLR and get media coverage📽️ from the likes of YourStory, Inc42, CNBC-TV18 among others.

Join the ranks of our Alumni like Atlan (a $500M+ company), Thinkerbell Labs (Featured on Shark Tank India), BiteSpeed (Backed by Sequoia Surge), and numerous others.

Zero-cost, zero-equity; Register now.

Link in bio!

“Amazing is the word I would use. This is the kind of environment India is looking forward to. India is now building companies, global companies. Lucky to see the energy in the room from amazing entrepreneurs building amazing products at Conquest.” - Ashish Singhal, Cofounder and CEO at @coinswitch_co 

Bringing to you the aftermovie of Conquest ‘22 🚀

Relive our biggest edition to date with highlights including:

✅ The launch of The India Portfolio Summit, Conquest’s flagship virtual event where we saw 30+ stalwarts, the likes of @a.palicha from @zeptonow and Piyush Shah from @inmobi_official, of the Indian business and startup landscape share their journeys. 

✅ Our cohort founders interacted with some of India’s best founders including @nithinkamath from @zerodhaonline and Sujeet Kumar from Udaan.

✅ We disbursed over Rs. 30L as equity-free grants to startups.

✅ We provided our cohort with 500+ hours of mentoring with our mentor network of 100+ industry leaders from across the ecosystem.

✅ We returned to an offline Demo Day in BLR after two years pulling off a grand event covered by @cnbctv18india in a 30min special episode.

Conquest is back with its 19th edition 🚀 to help India's most promising early-stage startups catalyze their growth. Stay tuned for more updates!

Conquest started in 2004 in a small room in BITS Pilani with ten college students who wanted to #MakeAMark on the startup ecosystem.

Since then, we’re growing at lightning speed are nowhere close to the climax!

Follow @conquestbits to know more about our current pace of growth and how we are still evolving to #MakeAMark.
